languages.text: Вольный Торговец узнал, где проходит кабель питания врат. Пора лишить их энергии.

traits.locale_text: Вольный Торговец узнал, где проходит кабель питания врат. Пора лишить их энергии.

languages.text: The Rogue Trader has discovered the route of the gate's power cable. The time has come to deprive it of energy.
languages.original_text: Вольный Торговец узнал, где проходит кабель питания врат. Пора лишить их энергии.

traits.locale_text: The Rogue Trader has discovered the route of the gate's power cable. The time has come to deprive it of energy.
The Rogue Trader has discovered the route of the gate's power cable. The time has come to deprive it of energy.
The Rogue Trader has discovered the route of the gate's power cable. The time has come to deprive it of energy.
The Rogue Trader has discovered the route of the gate's power cable. The time has come to deprive it of energy.

languages.text: {mf|Der Freihändler|Die Freihändlerin} hat den Verlauf des Stromkabels des Tors entdeckt. Es wird Zeit, die Energieversorgung zu unterbrechen.
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader has discovered the route of the gate's power cable. The time has come to deprive it of energy.

traits.locale_text: {mf|Der Freihändler|Die Freihändlerin} hat den Verlauf des Stromkabels des Tors entdeckt. Es wird Zeit, die Energieversorgung zu unterbrechen.

languages.text: {mf|Le libre-marchand|La libre-marchande} a découvert par où passait le câble d'alimentation de la porte. Il est temps de la priver d'énergie.
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader has discovered the route of the gate's power cable. The time has come to deprive it of energy.

traits.locale_text: {mf|Le libre-marchand|La libre-marchande} a découvert par où passait le câble d'alimentation de la porte. Il est temps de la priver d'énergie.

languages.text: 行商浪人已经查明大门供能电缆的走向。是时候切断它的能源了。
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader has discovered the route of the gate's power cable. The time has come to deprive it of energy.

traits.locale_text: 行商浪人已经查明大门供能电缆的走向。是时候切断它的能源了。

languages.text: {mf|El|La} Comerciante Independiente ha descubierto el recorrido del cable que suministra energía a la puerta. Ha llegado la hora de cortar la corriente.
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader has discovered the route of the gate's power cable. The time has come to deprive it of energy.

traits.locale_text: {mf|El|La} Comerciante Independiente ha descubierto el recorrido del cable que suministra energía a la puerta. Ha llegado la hora de cortar la corriente.

languages.text: フリー・トレーダーがゲートの電源ケーブルのありかを突き止めた。ゲートの電力を抜く時が来た。
languages.original_text: The Free Trader has discovered where the gate's power cable runs. It's time to drain the gate of power.

languages.text: Hür Tacir, geçidin güç kablosunun geçtiği yolu keşfetti. Onu enerjisiz bırakma zamanı geldi.
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader has discovered the route of the gate's power cable. The time has come to deprive it of energy.

traits.locale_text: Hür Tacir, geçidin güç kablosunun geçtiği yolu keşfetti. Onu enerjisiz bırakma zamanı geldi.
